nodes.label: AI for administrative tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI as time-consuming or unreliable for data tasks
nodes.grounding_span: it can save me so much time on the admin side

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and research tool for scripture and sermon ideas
nodes.grounding_span: I feel like I need to have embodied what the bible has said

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI unreliability for structured data tasks
nodes.grounding_span: it keeps getting things wrong regardless of how clear my prompt was

nodes.label: AI as tool vs spiritual authority
nodes.grounding_span: AI is not the voice of God. It is a tool to use for ministry not to act as God.

nodes.label: AI staying within requested boundaries
nodes.grounding_span: I don't want to become so dependent on AI that I can't live without

nodes.label: Pastoral presence and relational care
nodes.grounding_span: free me up to be with the people

nodes.label: Spiritual authenticity and discernment
nodes.grounding_span: AI is not the voice of God

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: save me so much time on the admin side

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: It made me feel really satisfied when I was able to create a very practical handover document

nodes.label: Frustration with AI for data tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I've been angry when I've been doing a task such as trying to create a decent CSV file

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: I feel like it will get better but I have to have good boundaries

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in sermon writing
nodes.grounding_span: I'm not happy doing as I feel like I need to have embodied what the bible has said

nodes.label: Task-dependent delegation vs. collaboration
nodes.grounding_span: Depending on the task, I will either begin a task with it and work together throughout, whereas there are some tasks I now delegate

nodes.label: Boundary-setting and stewardship mindset
nodes.grounding_span: I have to have good boundaries in place like any relationship
